summary: color-style-utils ships a postinstall script that exfiltrates host data over HTTP
details: The package's postinstall.js executes automatically on `npm install` and combines `require('child_process')` with outbound HTTP requests (`http.request(...)`, GET/POST) and host-identification data collection (multiple `hostname:` fields constructed and sent in the request payload). This is the canonical install-time host-exfiltration shape: a lifecycle hook gathering machine identifiers and shelling out via child_process while contacting a network endpoint. The package's stated purpose (color/style utility) provides no legitimate justification for running shell commands or transmitting host metadata at install time. Any developer or CI system that runs `npm install` for this package will execute the postinstall payload and leak host information.

cwes.description: The product contains code that appears to be malicious in nature.
cwes.name: Embedded Malicious Code
